items.title_en: Trump says Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended by three weeks
items.title_zh: 特朗普称以色列与黎巴嫩停火期限延长三周
items.desc_en: Israel and Lebanon agreed to extend their ceasefire by three weeks following a meeting in the White House with top U.S. officials, President Donald Trump said.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统表示，在白宫与美国高级官员举行会议后，以色列和黎巴嫩同意将停火期限延长三周。

items.title_en: Trump says Americans should expect higher gas prices for 'a little while'
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示美国人应该预期汽油价格会上涨“一段时间”
items.desc_en: Trump's remarks came as most Americans say they have cut spending due to high gas prices, according to the latest CNBC All-America Economic survey.
items.desc_zh: 根据 CNBC 最新的全美经济调查，特朗普发表此番言论之际，大多数美国人表示，由于高油价，他们已经削减了支出。

items.title_en: NYC Mayor Mamdani knocked Ken Griffin in pied-a-terre tax promo. His firm calls the move 'shameful'
items.title_zh: 纽约市市长马姆达尼在临时税收促销活动中击败了肯·格里芬。他的公司称此举“可耻”
items.desc_en: Chief Operating Officer Gerald Beeson saying in a memo that targeting Griffin showed "ignorance and disdain" toward contributors to the city's economy.

items.title_en: US boards ship carrying Iran oil as Trump threatens mine-laying vessels

items.desc_en: Central Command said it has intercepted 33 vessels since imposing a blockade on ships coming to and from Iran.
items.desc_zh: 中央司令部表示，自对进出伊朗的船只实施封锁以来，已拦截了 33 艘船只。

items.title_en: Nike cuts 1,400 roles in second round of layoffs this year
items.title_zh: 耐克今年第二轮裁员 1400 人
items.desc_en: Nike announced 1,400 layoffs, primarily in its technology department, on Thursday after previously cutting 775 jobs in January.
items.desc_zh: 继 1 月份裁员 775 人之后，耐克于周四宣布裁员 1,400 人，主要是在技术部门。

items.title_zh: 随着公司深入人工智能领域，Meta 将裁员 10%
items.desc_en: Meta plans to lay off 10% of its workforce, equaling about 8,000 employees, as the company continues to ramp up investments in artificial intelligence.
items.desc_zh: 随着公司继续加大对人工智能的投资，Meta 计划裁员 10%，相当于约 8,000 名员工。

items.desc_en: In a phone interview with the BBC's North America editor, the president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK PM.

items.title_zh: 微软计划进行公司 51 年历史上的首次员工自愿买断
items.desc_en: Microsoft's inaugural voluntary buyouts will be open to workers at the senior director level and below whose years of employment and age add up to 70 or more.
items.desc_zh: 微软首次自愿买断将向高级主管级别及以下级别的员工开放，他们的工作年限和年龄合计达到 70 岁或以上。

items.title_zh: 南非总统在法庭指控后暂停警察局长职务
items.desc_en: Cyril Ramaphosa said the suspension was because of the critical role Fannie Masemola plays in fighting crime.
items.desc_zh: 西里尔·拉马福萨表示，此次停职是因为房利美·马塞莫拉在打击犯罪方面发挥了关键作用。

items.desc_zh: 据报道，艾哈迈德·谢哈布-埃尔丁在转发与伊朗战争有关的图片后面临包括散布虚假信息在内的指控。

items.title_en: In Tehran, money is short and a return to war looms over daily life

items.title_en: Lebanon accuses Israel of targeting journalist killed in airstrike
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩指责以色列针对在空袭中丧生的记者
items.desc_en: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also stopped rescuers from reaching the site.
items.desc_zh: 以色列国防军袭击红十字会车辆并阻止救援人员到达现场后，黎巴嫩总理指责以色列犯有战争罪。

items.title_en: US Navy chief leaving post 'effective immediately', Pentagon says
items.title_zh: 五角大楼表示，美国海军司令离职“立即生效”
items.desc_en: US Navy Secretary John Phelan is the latest high-ranking military leader to leave the administration in recent months.
items.desc_zh: 美国海军部长约翰·费兰是近几个月来最新一位离开政府的高级军事领导人。

items.title_en: Teenager found in singer D4vd's car died of 'multiple injuries'
items.title_zh: 歌手 D4vd 车内发现的青少年“多处受伤”身亡
items.desc_en: The medical examiner said the 14-year-old's cause of death was determined months ago but was blocked from release.
items.desc_zh: 法医称，这名 14 岁男子的死因几个月前已确定，但被阻止释放。

items.desc_zh: 微软表示，新的《使命召唤》游戏将在发布“大约一年”后添加到订阅服务中。

items.title_en: UK gaming icon Peter Molyneux on AI, his final creation and a changing industry
items.title_zh: 英国游戏偶像 Peter Molyneux 谈人工智能、他的最终创作和不断变化的行业
items.desc_en: The creator of iconic series such as Fable says Masters of Albion will be the last game he makes.
items.desc_zh: 《神鬼寓言》等标志性系列游戏的创作者表示，《阿尔比恩大师》将是他制作的最后一款游戏。

items.title_en: Meta to track workers' clicks and keystrokes to train AI

items.desc_en: The firm will take data from the way employees work for its artificial intelligence models.
items.desc_zh: 该公司将从员工的工作方式中获取数据用于其人工智能模型。

items.title_en: AI hacking tools like Mythos can be 'net positive' says top cyber official
items.title_zh: 高级网络官员表示，像 Mythos 这样的人工智能黑客工具可能具有“净积极性”
items.desc_en: The head of the National Cyber Security Centre says frontier AI tools can be a force for good - if kept out of the wrong hands.
items.desc_zh: 国家网络安全中心负责人表示，前沿人工智能工具如果不落入坏人之手，可以成为一股正义的力量。

items.title_en: Ofcom investigating Telegram over child sexual abuse material concerns
items.title_zh: Ofcom 就儿童性虐待材料问题对 Telegram 进行调查
items.desc_en: The popular messaging service told the BBC in a statement it "categorically denies Ofcom's accusations".
items.desc_zh: 这家受欢迎的消息服务公司在一份声明中告诉英国广播公司，它“断然否认 Ofcom 的指控”。

items.title_en: How will Apple change under 'product guy' John Ternus?
items.title_zh: 在“产品人”约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 的领导下，苹果将如何改变？
items.desc_en: As Tim Cook announces his departure from the top job at Apple, these are the key challenges for new boss John Ternus.
items.desc_zh: 随着蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 宣布辞去苹果公司最高职位，这些都是新任老板约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 面临的主要挑战。

items.title_en: Apple names new chief executive to replace Tim Cook
items.title_zh: 苹果任命新首席执行官接替蒂姆·库克
items.desc_en: John Ternus will take over running the technology giant as Cook steps up to become executive chairman.
items.desc_zh: 随着库克出任执行董事长，约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 将接管这家科技巨头的运营。

items.title_en: Blue Origin rocket grounded after satellite 'mishap'
items.title_zh: 蓝色起源火箭因卫星“事故”而停飞
items.desc_en: The firm founded by Amazon billionaire Jeff Bezos is investigating the failed launch.
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊亿万富翁杰夫·贝索斯创立的公司正在调查此次失败的发射。

items.title_en: Elon Musk summoned by French prosecutors amid ongoing X probe
items.title_zh: 法国检察官在正在进行的 X 调查中传唤埃隆·马斯克
items.desc_en: Whether the tech billionaire will attend the interview requested by Paris prosecutors remains to be seen.
items.desc_zh: 这位科技亿万富翁是否会参加巴黎检察官要求的面谈还有待观察。
